sql.query: SELECT t.id,t.templateId,t.templateStageId,t.taskName,t.description,t.sortOrder,t.priority,t.status,t.isRequired,t.dueOffsetType,t.dueOffsetDays,t.dueTime,t.dueRelation,t.defaultOwnerType,t.defaultOwnerId,s.stageName FROM tbl_template_tasks t INNER JOIN tbl_template_stages s ON s.id=t.templateStageId AND s.templateId=t.templateId AND s.tenantId=t.tenantId WHERE t.templateId=:templateId AND t.templateStageId=:stageId AND t.tenantId=:tenantId ORDER BY t.sortOrder,t.id
